steps.title: Find the central question
steps.content: The passage explicitly poses the guiding question: “What explains its rise in popularity?” This is the question the entire passage attempts to answer.

steps.title: Match the question to the choices
steps.content:
The passage explains why y'all rose in popularity: it fills a gap in many varieties of English that lack a specific plural “you” pronoun, enabling more precise communication.

This directly answers choice D, which asks why y'all became more widely used in the US.

The other three choices ask about information the passage never addresses.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
